# 🧬 CGT 每日情报 (Daily Brief)
> **日期**: 2026-03-25 | **更新时间**: 06:55 (北京时间)
> **监控范围**: Global (In vivo/FDA) & China (NMPA/Biotech)

---

## 🌍 全球前沿 (FDA / In vivo / MNCs)
- `[16:45]` **IASO Bio 已获得日本 PMDA 的许可，启动 CAR-T 疗法 Equecabtagene Autoleucel 治疗二线或三线多发性骨髓瘤的临床试验**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *IASO Bio Has Received Clearance from Japan's PMDA to Initiate Clinical Trial for CAR-T Therapy Equecabtagene Autoleucel in Second- or Third-Line Multiple Myeloma* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
